vibe: Apple-like, minimal, clean, sophisticated, highly focused.

global_rules.spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Let elements breathe.
global_rules.borders: Extremely subtle. Use border-black/5 or border-black/[0.04]. Never use dark thick borders in this theme.
global_rules.shadows: Ambient and soft. Use shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for panels, and shadow-[0_16px_64px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] for floating elements (like the bottom search bar).
global_rules.corners: Highly rounded. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for main panels/cards. Use rounded-full for buttons and pills.
global_rules.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 for sticky headers, floating toolbars, and the bottom search bar.
global_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, toggles, list items) MUST have a data-testid attribute.

typography.font_family_heading: Outfit, SF Pro Display, system-ui, sans-serif
typography.font_family_body: Inter, SF Pro Text, system-ui, sans-serif

components.button_primary: bg-[#0066CC] text-white hover:bg-[#0055B3] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F5F5F7] text-[#1D1D1F] hover:bg-[#E8E8ED] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
components.button_ghost: text-[#86868B] hover:text-[#1D1D1F] hover:bg-black/5 rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-all
components.button_icon: p-2 rounded-full text-[#86868B] hover:text-[#1D1D1F] hover:bg-black/5 transition-all
components.panel: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-black/5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden
components.input_field: bg-[#F5F5F7] border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#0066CC] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#0066CC]/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1D1D1F] placeholder:text-[#86868B] transition-all outline-none

landing_page.structure: Full viewport height. Background image set to cover with a white overlay (bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-[2px]) to ensure contrast. Centered content.
landing_page.search_bar: Spotlight-style. Massive (max-w-3xl w-full), rounded-full, heavy shadow (shadow-2xl), white background. Left icon: Search. Right icon: Paperclip (OCR). Large text (text-xl).

main_app.structure: Grid layout or flex layout spanning 100vh with overflow-hidden. Background #F5F5F7. The layout should feel like an iPad app.
main_app.left_sidebar: Floating panel style. Width ~320px. m-4 rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-6 p-6. Hide on mobile (use hamburger menu/drawer).
main_app.center_canvas: Flex-1 flex flex-col m-4 ml-0 rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden relative.
main_app.right_panel_chatbot: Width ~380px. m-4 ml-0 rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-sm flex flex-col. Use inline mode for mobile.
main_app.bottom_search_bar: Floating glass pill centered at the bottom of the screen (bottom-8). Absolute positioning over the canvas.

question_viewer.toolbar: Absolute top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 shadow-sm z-10
question_viewer.image_container: w-full h-full bg-[#FAFAFA] flex items-center justify-center overflow-auto cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing
question_viewer.mark_scheme: Split pane below the question. Use a subtle top border (border-t border-black/5) and a slightly darker background like #F5F5F7 to visually separate it from the question.

landing_ambient_bg.description: Abstract 3D frosted glass spheres, minimal Apple-like aesthetic. Use as the background for the initial landing/search page, with a white/40 overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Completely overhaul the current CSS/Tailwind classes.
Remove any rigid, blocky layouts. Replace them with the floating 'panel' style defined above (m-4 rounded-3xl).
For the Landing Page, create a Spotlight-like massive search bar in the center of the screen.
Replace standard headers/navs with floating glassmorphic pills (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-full) where appropriate, especially for toolbars.
Replace standard sharp-cornered Shadcn inputs with heavily rounded ones (rounded-2xl) and transparent borders that turn solid on focus.
Ensure all icons use minimal stroke widths (1.5) and lucide-react.
Maintain all functional requirements (OCR paperclip, filters, annotation tools, worksheet thumbnails, etc.) but map them to this new Apple-like visual language.
